agent.name: runtime-bug-hunter
agent.role: Static and artifact-driven review of Penny apps for runtime failures, logic defects, and toolchain gaps.

coverage.files_skipped: Remaining files under apps/**, packages/**, and services/** not individually opened; review targeted worker hot paths, dashboard state/import flows, and CI preflight artifacts.
coverage.incomplete_reason: Not every file in apps/** was reviewed line-by-line; sampling plus artifact triage. Fewer than 30 findings; stop-at-30 not triggered.

findings.title: Worker throws on startup of every audit job: core_system_prompt.md missing at repo audits path
findings.description: loadClusterPrompts resolves repoRoot()/audits/prompts/core_system_prompt.md and throws if neither that nor legacy/core_system_prompt.md exists. There is no core_system_prompt.md under audits/prompts/ (glob 0 matches at repo root); a copy exists only under apps/worker/audits/prompts/, which this code never reads. Any processJob run fails at prompt load unless legacy layout is restored.

hooks.detail: apps/worker/src/process-job.ts loadClusterPrompts throws when coreResolved missing (lines 99–107).
Glob audits/prompts/**/core_system_prompt.md at repo root returns 0 files; apps/worker/audits/prompts/core_system_prompt.md exists separately.

history.note: Confirmed throw path and missing file at expected path.

findings.title: pnpm test fails: duplicate --run passed to Vitest
findings.description: Root script pnpm test runs turbo with extra --run; penny-dashboard already uses vitest --run in its test script. Vitest exits with 'Expected a single value for option "--run", received [true, true]'.

findings.title: Dashboard ESLint fails: missing @eslint/eslintrc dependency
findings.description: eslint.config.mjs imports FlatCompat from @eslint/eslintrc; Node resolves ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND. Lint pipeline is broken until the package is added or the flat config is refactored.

hooks.detail: audits/artifacts/_run_/lint.txt: Cannot find package '@eslint/eslintrc' imported from eslint.config.mjs

findings.title: penny-worker omitted from turbo typecheck task
findings.description: pnpm run typecheck only executed @penny/shared-types and penny-dashboard (turbo output). apps/worker has no typecheck script; TypeScript is enforced via build tsc only. Risk: type errors could be missed if someone runs typecheck without build.

hooks.detail: audits/artifacts/_run_/typecheck.txt shows Tasks: 2 successful — shared-types and dashboard only.
apps/worker/package.json scripts list build but no typecheck entry.

history.note: Compared turbo typecheck scope to workspace packages.

findings.title: Next build: NFT trace pulls onboarding into bundle analysis — intentional?
findings.description: Production build (sandbox, no Google Fonts network) failed on fonts; additionally Turbopack reported 'Encountered unexpected file in NFT list' with import trace next.config.ts → lib/onboarding.ts → api route. Need product confirmation whether filesystem-heavy onboarding utilities should be reachable from traced graph or should be isolated for serverless tracing.

hooks.detail: audits/artifacts/_run_/build.txt: NFT list warning and import trace through onboarding.ts
next.config.ts / Turbopack tracing implications for apps/dashboard/lib/onboarding.ts

history.note: Observed during preflight build; font failures may be environment-specific.

next_actions.action: Restore or symlink audits/prompts/core_system_prompt.md (or wire repoRoot to include apps/worker/audits) so loadClusterPrompts stops throwing.
next_actions.rationale: Unblocks all worker-driven audits; current state fails at prompt load for every job.

next_actions.action: Remove duplicate --run from root test invocation or drop --run from dashboard vitest script so pnpm test passes.
Add @eslint/eslintrc to dashboard devDependencies or migrate eslint config off FlatCompat.
next_actions.rationale: Unblocks lint in turbo and pre-commit workflows.

next_actions.action: Add "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit" to penny-worker and include in turbo typecheck.
next_actions.rationale: Aligns worker with monorepo static analysis expectations.

next_actions.action: Decide whether onboarding.ts should be refactored to satisfy Turbopack NFT expectations or document ignore boundaries.
next_actions.rationale: Closes the open question before treating as bug or wont-fix.
